title: trifolium mutabile
intro: Trifolium mutabile, also known as the variable clover, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family Fabaceae. The plant's leaves, flowers, and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trifolium mutabile include reducing symptoms of menopause, improving digestion, and supporting cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of this plant can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
